top_signals.title: Segro Rejects Fresh £13.5 Billion Cash and Share Prologis Offer
top_signals.summary: Segro Plc has rejected the latest proposal from Prologis Inc. that offered about £13.5 billion for the UK warehouse landlord.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ryanair profit slumps 34% as airlines brace for a 'difficult winter' amid Middle East crisis
top_signals.summary: Ryanair's first-quarter profit took a 34% hit as consumers delayed bookings due to the Middle East crisis, while struggling airlines face a "difficult winter."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Octopus-Backed MOPO Partners Nigeria in $75 Million Battery Plan
top_signals.summary: MOPO, an Africa-focused battery rental company backed by Octopus Energy Group Ltd., said it’s signed an agreement with Nigeria to facilitate a $75 million expansion of its activities in Africa’s most populous nation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rising Demand for Hedges Hints at Volatility Ahead: Taking Stock
top_signals.summary: The momentum trade carried along by the equity rally is faltering, while optimistic earnings expectations are under intense scrutiny, two of the signs pointing to a volatile summer.

top_signals.title: Blow winds blow: Time to harvest wind power off Japan’s coast
top_signals.summary: Japan is investing heavily in offshore wind abroad while its domestic sector still lags due to policy and infrastructure hurdles.

top_signals.title: These are the most oversold stocks after a rough week on Wall Street - CNBC
top_signals.summary: These are the most oversold stocks after a rough week on Wall Street  CNBC
